section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 19 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 0.11%. the main contract I2405 closed 923. some traders were negative to sell;Steel mills are cautious and cautious, with low price procurement being the main focus.
